title: Diagnose an ungrounded answer
description: Trace a wrong answer back through grounding, retrieval, and chunking to find where the supporting passage was lost.
body: Steps: 1. Take the bad answer and check whether any retrieved passage supports the claim. 2. If a supporting passage was retrieved but ignored, the fault is generation/grounding. 3. If none was retrieved, check whether the reranker dropped it or first-stage retrieval missed it. 4. If retrieval missed it, check whether chunking split the answer or the embedding mismatched the query. 5. Fix at the lowest failing stage. Rollback point: before re-ingesting or re-embedding. Validation: the corrected stage retrieves and grounds the previously failing query.
